Your webshop, in any language, in minutes.

ShopVirge builds your multilingual webshop or portfolio — no code, no hassle. Describe your products once, and we'll handle the rest.

Start free → See examples

Everything you need to grow

From automatic translations to payment integrations — ShopVirge handles it.

🌍

Automatic multilingual

Translating has never been easier. Your entire site — products, text, pages — gets translated automatically. You choose which languages.

⚡

Live in under an hour

From concept to fully live site in less than an hour. No technical knowledge needed. Upload your products and the rest happens automatically.

💳

Payment platforms built-in

Accept payments via iDEAL, PayPal, credit card and more — all integrated, no extra plugins required.

📱

Mobile-first design

Every site looks perfect on phone, tablet and desktop. Optimized for speed and conversion.

🎨

No design skills needed

Professional-looking websites out of the box. Choose from ready-made templates and customize with your own brand colors.

📊

Analytics built-in

Track visitors, conversions and product performance with built-in dashboards. No external tools needed.

How it works

1

Tell us what you sell

Describe your products or services. Upload photos. Give us the basics.

2

We translate everything

Choose your languages and ShopVirge automatically translates your entire site.

3

Go live

Publish with one click. From that moment on, your multilingual shop runs.

Simple pricing

No surprises. Pay for what you use.
